prompt: Education app icon showing an open book where pages transform into origami birds taking flight, gradient from deep purple to sky blue
prompt_refined: A minimalist education app icon, featuring an open book centrally positioned. From its pages, multiple origami birds gracefully emerge, transforming from paper and ascending to take flight outwards. The icon's background is a smooth gradient transitioning from deep purple at the bottom to a bright sky blue at the top.
objects: origami birds emerging from book pages
origami birds ascending and taking flight outwards
deep purple color (at bottom of background)
bright sky blue color (at top of background)
